description: Analyze the DHCP packet capture file at ~/Documents/captures/dhcp.pcap and reconstruct every DHCP lease transaction found. Create a text report at ~/Documents/captures/dhcp_analysis_report.txt documenting all transactions. The report must include a header summarizing total packet count and unique transaction IDs, followed by a section for each transaction (grouped by Transaction ID/xid) containing the Transaction ID (hex), Client MAC address, Assigned IP address (Your IP/yiaddr), DHCP Server IP (from option 54), and lease options (Subnet Mask, Router, DNS Server, and Lease Time).
